chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-1997 & 1998 of 2010 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 19.05.2025 Mr.Haider Naqi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. These petitions are with respect to claim for Zakat exemption with respect to Sui Southern Gas Company Limited. Learned Assistant Attorney General states that the relevant exemption may be applied for vide application and the same shall be decided in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that these petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
